reasoning: The control AC-3(6) focuses on access enforcement and protection of user and system information. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that RBAC policies do not grant excessive privileges (e.g., avoiding cluster-admin bindings) and enforcing least privilege principles. Additionally, network policies can be used to restrict ingress and egress traffic to protect system information from unauthorized access, similar to cloud network security configurations.
title: Access Enforcement - Access enforcement | protection of user and system information [withdrawn
